stocks.impact_theory: Alphabet reported strong Q1 earnings with cloud revenue up 63% YoY, driven by AI demand. Economic implications include accelerated cloud spending amid AI boom, boosting GDP via tech investment. Market psychology: Reinforces Big Tech dominance, triggering FOMO buying. Historical parallels: Similar to 2023 AI rally post-earnings. Analogies: Like pouring gasoline on a tech bonfire; a rising tide lifting all AI boats.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X posts show excitement over earnings beat and cloud growth; web news highlights record highs ahead of busy week. Sentiment shift positive with high engagement.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 10-15% gains on continued AI momentum

stocks.justification: Strong earnings beat, high X sentiment, historical post-earnings momentum.

stocks.impact_theory: Q1 earnings crushed expectations with EPS $8.55 vs $6.70, Rev $19.8B vs $17.8B, fueled by GLP-1 drugs. Economic: Supports healthcare spending, obesity treatment boom. Psychology: Validates premium valuation. Parallels: Novo Nordisk rally. Analogies: Weight-loss drugs as the new iPhone; pharma rocket amid health crisis.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Massive beat reported in X and news; high likes/reposts indicate strong sentiment shift.

stocks.justification: Huge earnings surprise, positive X buzz.

stocks.impact_theory: Earnings showed 33% revenue growth but not pristine quarter. Implications: Ad spend resilient despite macro. Psychology: Battleground stock, dip-buying. Parallels: Post-2022 recovery. Analogies: Bouncing ball in volatile arena; phoenix from ad slump ashes.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X traders adding on dip; growth at scale praised despite concerns.

stocks.justification: Mixed reaction but underlying growth solid.

stocks.impact_theory: Post-earnings ~20% pullback, but JPM upgrade to OW PT$400 citing GPU test ramp, ASIC demand. Implications: AI infrastructure spend. Psychology: Buy the dip. Parallels: Semi test cycles. Analogies: Diamond in rough post-selloff; coiling spring for AI tailwinds.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Upgrade news shifts sentiment from post-earnings fear to opportunity.

stocks.impact_theory: Q1 results announced, dividend approved. Implications: Steady auto aftermarket. Psychology: Value play in mixed market. Parallels: Cyclical recoveries. Analogies: Reliable engine in choppy waters; steady eddy amid volatility.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Positive earnings release, dividend hike; limited X buzz but stable.
